title: KeyPackageReady broadcast after store write creates happens-before edge
description: relay/src/ws.rs:541-557: KeyPackageReady is broadcast only AFTER save_key_package().await completes. This ensures any GetKeyPackage sent in response to the notification will find the stored package. Broadcasting before await introduces a race where admin's GetKeyPackage arrives before the async write commits, returning None and silently failing to add the new member (no error, no retry).
